description_long: This object is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a short barrel and a squared-off slide. The grip appears ergonomically contoured, likely textured for improved handling, and the trigger guard is robust and slightly rounded. The slide is relatively flat on top, with subtle serrations or grooves for better grip during operation. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without any pronounced extensions. No visible external accessories or attachments are present, and the overall design suggests a modern, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a contoured grip and squared slide, featuring a flush magazine base and robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from above, showing the full outline of the slide, grip, and barrel, with the compact profile and flush magazine base clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the handgun, revealing the squared slide, trigger guard, and the ergonomic grip contour.
description_view_2: The handgun is viewed from the opposite side, emphasizing the short barrel and the alignment of the slide with the grip.
description_view_3: A rear-side view displays the back of the grip and the slide, with the magazine base and rear sight area visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is compact and ergonomically contoured, likely constructed from a durable polymer with a matte finish. It features subtle texturing or stippling for enhanced traction, and the sides appear slightly curved to fit comfortably in the hand. There are no visible finger grooves or logos, and the base of the grip is flush with the magazine, maintaining a streamlined appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly rounded, with a moderate thickness that provides ample protection for the trigger. It lacks any aggressive undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible texturing or integrated accessories. The design is functional and standard, prioritizing safety and ease of use.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and standard in profile, with no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. It is flush with the slide and has a matte finish consistent with the rest of the handgun. No external markings or special features are apparent on the barrel exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. Its design is minimalistic and streamlined, with no visible logos or texturing.
